description: A query clearly matching only the frontend resume - it should be the top result. NOT asserting exclusion of the GCP resume here: it's split into 2 chunks (deliberately, for the dedup test below), which gives it 2 chances to land in a small raw top-k versus 1 chance for single-chunk resumes - a real characteristic of chunk-then-dedup retrieval, not a bug in this fixture. Worth knowing this could skew production ranking toward longer/more-chunked resumes too, independent of actual relevance.

Query specifically asks for GCP - the AWS-only DevOps resume is cloud-adjacent but shouldn't outrank the actual GCP match. Not asserting AWS resume is fully excluded (it's a plausible partial match), just that it doesn't outrank the true match.
query: Google Cloud Platform GCP infrastructure experience
